priority: PHP tokenizer extension over phrust lexer

token_get_all and token_name function visibility
TOKEN_PARSE constant visibility and accepted flag handling
TOKEN_PARSE syntax validation through the parser with catchable ParseError reporting
TOKEN_PARSE invalid legacy octal and unicode codepoint escape ParseError reporting

Legacy T_PAAMAYIM_NEKUDOTAYIM alias to T_DOUBLE_COLON
Standalone T_NS_SEPARATOR and grouped namespace-name token output
T_BAD_CHARACTER output for unexpected control characters
TOKEN_PARSE semi-reserved keyword reclassification for member access, class const names, and trait namespace aliases

Nowdoc/heredoc flexible indentation stripping for fixture literal bodies
Open tag, whitespace, scalar, variable, punctuation, and inline HTML token output
Token array shape with id, text, and line number
Selected PHP 8.5 syntax tokens and invalid-octal overflow classification

PhpToken constructor public shape, final constructor override diagnostics, getTokenName nullability, Stringable instance checks, ignorable token classification, string casting, direct runtime method dispatch, method matching, subclass tokenize allocation, catchable subclass construction errors, and method error handling

PhpToken::tokenize object dump EXPECTF coverage and PHP-compatible object handle reuse order

Bare __halt_compiler fallback tokenization and inline HTML remainder handling
non_scope: Token IDs matching raw Zend numeric values
